summary: Profile Views feature fully tested — backend and frontend. All 7 backend tests passed. All 10 frontend scenarios verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: programme_slug uses internal route /coach/program/{slug} opened as target=_blank — acceptable for now but could be an external programme URL in future
500 errors visible in browser console on /dashboard (unrelated to profile views feature)
seed_data_creation: None — test coach had already viewed player profile 9 times
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Views feature fully working. Backend: GET /api/player/profile-views returns {views, total, page, pages} with deduplication (Test Coach viewed 9 times → 1 entry with view_count=9). Frontend: tab-messages and tab-profile-views both functional; profile-views-list, view-count-0 (shows '9 views'), verified-badge-0 (Verified), programme-link-0 (/coach/program/test-university) all rendering correctly. Switch back to Messages tab also works.

test_results_detail.backend_2: PASS: Response has views, total, page, pages fields
test_results_detail.backend_3: PASS: View items have all required fields (coach_id, coach_name, institution_name, division, is_verified, view_count, last_viewed_at, programme_slug)
test_results_detail.backend_4: PASS: Deduplication works — Test Coach 9 views → 1 entry with view_count=9
test_results_detail.frontend_3: PASS: Profile Views tab shows profile-views-list
test_results_detail.frontend_7: PASS: Switch back to Messages tab shows messages list
test_results_detail.frontend_8: PASS: Messages tab shows 1 message total (Test Coach message)
test_results_detail.frontend_9: PASS: unread badge not shown (message already read)
test_results_detail.frontend_10: PASS: Overall layout correct — Coach Inbox heading, tab bar, content
